title: (DISCONTINUED) Smithee's Foundry - Modular Tools for Fabric
body:
Smithee's Foundry is a mod that adds modular, survival friendly tools.

The main inspiration for this project was drawn from Tinkers Construct available for Forge.


The following is currently implemented:

Runtime generated tool parts

Standard set of tools

Standard set of materials

Material Traits

Metal Casting and Alloying

In-game guide

Many bugs that I am yet to find

Tool Modifiers
 


Planned Features:

Part Swap
 


This mod uses fabric api.
